## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run smoke` when a local or deployed URL is available

## Risk

- [ ] User-facing UI changed
- [ ] API/data contract changed
- [ ] Environment variables changed
- [ ] Deployment/pipeline changed
- [ ] Database/storage/AI behavior changed
